name: domain-language
description: DDD ubiquitous language glossary, domain-model interview that updates CONTEXT.md/ADRs inline, plan grilling, and a one-line zoom-out. Adapted from mattpocock/skills.

interface.shortDescription: DDD ubiquitous language + domain model interview + grilling.
interface.longDescription: Bundle of four DDD-leaning skills: extract a ubiquitous language glossary from conversation into UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md, run a grilling interview that sharpens terminology and updates CONTEXT.md/docs/adr inline as decisions crystallise, run plain plan-grilling without domain coupling, and a one-line zoom-out for unfamiliar code areas. Adapted from Matt Pocock's skills repository (MIT) with Korean trigger keywords.
defaultPrompt: Use $domain-language to extract a ubiquitous language glossary from this conversation into UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md.
Use $domain-language to grill this plan against the existing domain model and update CONTEXT.md inline.
Use $domain-language to give me a higher-level map of the modules involved in this code area.
